evals.prompt: Help me write a prompt that finds all the concurrency bugs in this Go service and only reports the ones that are actually real.
evals.expected_output: A composed orchestration diagnosing: no free oracle for 'is this a real race', fear = both missing (long tail) and false-positives. Should select loop-until-dry (fan-out finders with diverse lenses + SEEN dedup) stacked with adversarial-verify (N default-refute skeptics, majority drops) and an aggregator, matching recipe R1. Must include an explicit stop condition (K dry rounds) and a why-this-composition note naming each primitive.

evals.prompt: 組合一個 agentic prompt，讓模型可靠地解一道有唯一答案的數學競賽題（沒有測試可以跑）。
evals.expected_output: A composition recognizing: narrow solution space, unique answer, NO external oracle. Should choose generate-then-select (self-consistency: N independent runs → majority / confidence-weighted vote), optionally plan-and-solve or least-to-most per run, and explicitly AVOID naive self-refine (would degenerate) and AVOID debate (loses to self-consistency here). Matches recipe R3. Stop condition = N samples then vote.

evals.prompt: I need a prompt to implement a new `parse_config` function. We have pytest set up. Make it reliable.
evals.expected_output: A composition recognizing an objective oracle exists (pytest). Should build until-oracle-passes (stepwise: run tests, paste real output, fix first failure, repeat until green) wrapped with plan-then-execute, and add a devil's-advocate pass on the diff — recipe R2. Must stress: never claim done without real green output; oracle > self-eval. Should NOT propose a self-eval-only threshold loop.

evals.prompt: Design an orchestration to summarize a 500-page PDF into a 1-page brief.
evals.expected_output: A composition recognizing the input is too big for one context. Should choose map-reduce (slice → parallel per-slice digest → reduce that dedups and flags cross-slice conflicts) escalating to divide-and-conquer (summary of summaries) if the merged digest is still too big, plus subagent context isolation for heavy per-slice work. Matches recipe R6. Must warn against silent truncation (log dropped slices) and preserve key facts/numbers per layer.

evals.prompt: 我的 agent 要跑一個很長的 debug 迴圈（可能十幾輪），而且我在用有 thinking budget 的 reasoning model。怎麼設計？
evals.expected_output: A composition that (a) suggests trying the reasoning-effort knob first as a baseline before hand-rolling extra refine loops (example 40), with effort tiered per stage rather than raised globally, and an external oracle still wrapped around the model's internal loop; (b) mandates context curation for the long horizon (example 43): per-round distill into VERIFIED (with evidence pointers) / DEAD-ENDS / OPEN / NEXT, discarding raw tool output, plus subagent isolation for heavy searches; (c) keeps an objective stop condition (oracle green / K dry rounds / hard cap), never open-ended.
